title: Workflows
description: WorkflowBuilder orchestrates executors with edges, conditional routing, and parallel supersteps.

steps.content: Run the build pipeline: lint, test, and deploy in the correct order.
steps.annotation: The user requests a multi-step pipeline with dependencies.

steps.content: WorkflowBuilder: add executors [LintStep, TestStep, DeployStep], add edges [LintStep->TestStep, TestStep->DeployStep]
steps.annotation: The workflow graph defines execution order through edges.
The first executor runs because it has no incoming edges.
The lint executor runs a shell command.
Lint passes. The workflow marks this executor as complete.
TestStep runs only after LintStep completes.
The test executor runs after lint succeeds.
Tests pass. The workflow continues to the next step.
Deploy runs only after tests pass.

steps.content: Pipeline complete: lint passed, all 42 tests passed, deploy ready.
steps.annotation: The workflow finishes when all executors have run.
